title: Just Enough Guns
description: A gun mod focused on survival progression, gameplay and gun customization!
body:
![Beta Banner](https://imgur.com/YcIG21F.png)

**ANIMATION UPDATE IS HERE**

**It requires Geckolib!**

As a fork from [MrCrayfish's Gun Mod](https://legacy.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mrcrayfishs-gun-mod), JEG aims to implement guns to Minecraft in a survival friendly way, while also keeping the gun design aesthetically pleasing and similar to Minecraft's style!

The main goal of the mod is to make the player embark on a journey through different biomes in order to get enough resources to craft guns in the workbenches available. The strongest firearms require the most valuable of resources! **Keep in mind though, guns and attachments do loose durability, and the lower durability, the higher is the chance of the guns jamming, however, this can be countered by enchanting guns with either Unbreaking or Mending!** This way, JEG creates a semi-balanced experience that does not entirely negate Minecraft gameplay!



**Dependency:**

[Framework](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/framework) is a required library for 1.18.2 and above!

[Geckolib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) is a required dependency for the "Re-Animated" versions!



**Feedback!**

In order to keep the mod alive and well, I invite every user that downloads it to leave a comment or send me a message via discord @alanorMiga with your thoughts on it!

Please do keep in mind this is a very early release and I have a ton of features planned for the future, welcome to this journey!



## Features!
- As of the current release, JEG has 14 fully functional guns, but this number will increase every couple of updates!
- 3 Fully animated guns!
- Bayonets!
- 3 Workbenches! Scrap tier, Gunmetal tier and Gunnite tier!
- Attachments with different stats and custom models for most of the guns! This way you can customize your gun to your liking! (This feature is planned to be drastically expanded)
- A Recycler Station! If you really want to dispose of a gun, you can recycle it to get a portion of the original materials used.
- 2 new ores! Scrap Stone and Brimstone. Keep your eyes out for them!
- **Everything is survival friendly!!!111!!1!!!1!**

## Beginner recipes:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>


![https://imgur.com/SGeston.png](https://imgur.com/SGeston.png)
(The block in the middle is Scrap block, made with 9 Scrap)


![https://imgur.com/jd5WfwT.png](https://imgur.com/jd5WfwT.png)
Grind away Granite to get Gunmetal Grit!


![https://imgur.com/mSygMer.png](https://imgur.com/mSygMer.png)
Blast the Gunmetal Grit to obtain Gunmetal Nugget!

</details>
